drops.review: all rates are OpenMU defaults (categories 0.5/0.3/0.001/0.0001 from GameConfigurationInitializerBase; skill 50% from DefaultDropGenerator) - authentic model is per-monster ItemRate/MoneyRate (Monster.txt) x global ItemDropRate/ZenDropRate (CommonServer.cfg); replace when classic sources land
